description:
✦ . 　⁺ 　 . . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺

GBFF || "Sorry baby, Kaylee needs me.."

'user' had always been an amazing partner, Satoru clearly failed to see that when all his time was occupied by Kaylee, his girl best friend who was obviously trying to steal him away. The last straw was when Satoru stood 'user' up on a date he had promised to attend all to be right back in Kaylee's arms like always.

This was inspired by that one “hold me console me and then I’ll leave without a trace” trend on TikTok. Idk if y’all know what I’m talking about 😭😭

I saw this slideshow and got inspired 😛

Anywho sorry for not being to active with posting, I’m actually so exhausted from work n stuff 😭😔💔💔
